title: ligularia dolichobotrys
intro: Ligularia dolichobotrys, also known as the yellow ligularia, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to China, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and large, ovate leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ligularia dolichobotrys include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting relaxation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its potential health benefits.
